items.title: [正面] Хорошая гача. Что-то включил и залип на весь день....
items.summary: Хорошая гача. Что-то включил и залип на весь день. Не знаю, как тут по мете и прочему, но сюжет хороший, за первый день выбил ♥♥♥♥♥ лег, теперь просто кайфовать, качаться. Спасибо разрабам, надеюсь поработают над русским языком.

items.title: [正面] Gameplay is a mix of Slay the Spire with a really...
items.summary: Gameplay is a mix of Slay the Spire with a really good cosmic horror visual novel. There is a gatcha system but the devs are very very generous with free pulls and currency even after the normal newbie stage of the game. Characters are extremely well designed. The story is really interesting. But the combat is were the real meat and potatoes are at. It's slay the spire but your deck is made up of the cards of your teams 4 members so you have control over it massively. Instead of elements like other games, each character belong to one of 4 factions and your team can be made up of up to 2 factions thou you get a bonus for pure teams. And each faction has it's own mechanic leading to a lot of build variety and experimenting with team comps ever thou I hate doing that in other games. Trust me this game is amazing!
